channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Fran McCaffery named men’s basketball coach at UPenn
item.description: (WPHL) -- The University of Pennsylvania has announced that they have officially hired Fran McCaffery as the new men's basketball head coach. McCaffery is a Philadelphia native and UPenn alumni class of 1982.
item.dc:creator: Jessica Yakubovsky, PHL 17

item.title: Flyers fire coach John Tortorella in midst of another losing season
item.description: The Philadelphia Flyers fired coach John Tortorella on Thursday with nine games left in another losing season for a franchise that hasn’t been in the playoffs since 2020. The Flyers are last in the Metropolitan Division at 28-36-9 for 65 points under the notoriously brusque Tortorella.
item.dc:creator: DAN GELSTON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Pirates star Paul Skenes' strikeouts to help Gary Sinise Foundation for 2nd straight season
item.description: Pittsburgh Pirates star pitcher Paul Skenes will strike out batters for a good cause for a second straight season, donating $100 for each K to the Gary Sinise Foundation
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Lakers’ LeBron James addresses confrontation with ESPN’s Stephen A. Smith
item.description: During an extended interview on the “The Pat McAfee Show,” James says the polarizing Smith “completely missed the whole point” of why he approached him during a game earlier this month.
item.dc:creator: Khobi Price, The Mercury News

item.title: Red Bull Formula 1 team drops Liam Lawson and replaces him with Yuki Tsunoda
item.description: Red Bull dropped Liam Lawson as the teammate of Formula 1 champion Max Verstappen after just two rounds of the season and replaced him with Yuki Tsunoda on Thursday. Lawson was given the Red Bull seat despite not having previously driven a full F1 season and struggled immediately.
item.dc:creator: JAMES ELLINGWORTH, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: NBA teams set to hear more about league's plans for future European involvement
item.description: NBA teams will be briefed Thursday on the league’s ongoing quest to further align with FIBA and expand its role in European basketball.
item.dc:creator: Tim Reynolds, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Jokic gets a triple-double in his return to lead Nuggets past Bucks 127-117
item.description: DENVER (AP) — Nikola Jokic had 39 points, 10 rebounds and 10 assists in his first game back in nearly two weeks to lead the Denver Nuggets to a 127-117 victory against the Milwaukee Bucks on Wednesday night. The triple-double was Jokic’s NBA-leading 30th of the season.
item.dc:creator: CRAIG MEYER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: LeBron James has big finish to lift Lakers past Pacers and extend record scoring streak
item.description: LeBron James started the fourth quarter Wednesday in danger of failing to extend his NBA record for consecutive double-digit scoring games.
item.dc:creator: Michael Marot, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Florida coach brings team to famed local staple ahead of March Madness matchup in SF
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (KRON) -- Florida head coach Todd Golden is excited to be back in San Francisco this week -- a city where he began his head coaching career. Golden leads the No. 1 seed Gators for their Sweet 16 matchup Thursday against No. 4 seed Maryland.
item.dc:creator: Aaron Tolentino, KRON4

item.title: American figure skater Alysa Liu takes the lead on the opening night of the world championships
item.description: BOSTON (AP) — Alysa Liu rarely wavers when it comes to anything, whether it be her abrupt decision to retire after the 2022 Winter Olympics, or the American figure skater's similarly stunning decision to announce her comeback early last year.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: UConn's Dan Hurley expresses regret over postgame remarks that were caught on camera
item.description: UConn coach Dan Hurley acknowledged there are things that “I wish I didn’t do” as he expressed regret over making profane comments about the officiating after the Huskies’ NCAA Tournament loss to Florida.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Runnin' Utes name Chris Wilcox general manager
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Utah head men's basketball coach Alex Jensen continues to fill his staff, announcing the addition of Sacramento Kings Assistant GM Wes Wilcox as the newest general manager for the Runnin' Utes program.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: TCU's Hailey Van Lith glad to have shared publicly about mental health issues she dealt with in past
item.description: FORT WORTH, Texas (AP) — TCU standout guard Hailey Van Lith said that while difficult, she is glad to have shared publicly about mental health struggles she said she dealt with early in her basketball career. “It’s been very positive.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Mississippi State's Chandler Prater faces online criticism following JuJu Watkins injury
item.description: Mississippi State's Chandler Prater has disabled the comment section on her social media amid growing backlash that followed JuJu Watkins injury in the women's NCAA Tournament.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Iga Swiatek is given extra security protection at the Miami Open after being verbally harassed
item.description: MIAMI GARDENS, Fla. (AP) — Iga Swiatek was given extra security protection at the Miami Open after being verbally attacked during a practice session by a man who had sent the five-time Grand Slam champion harassing messages via social media. “We monitor the network to catch these types of issues.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Softball: Poway 2, Patrick Henry 0
item.description: SAN DIEGO (KUSI)- A gorgeous day to play softball on Monday afternoon with Patrick Henry hosting Poway. The Titans won a fantastic game 2-0 in 10 innings. Great pitching on both sides with Mya McGowan leading the way for Poway with a complete game shutout and adding 12 strikeouts.
item.dc:creator: Nick James, Fox 5

item.title: USF Football spring game features street fest & halftime alumni game
item.description: TAMPA (USF) - The USF Spring Game returns to Corbett Stadium on the USF Campus on Sat., April 26 and will feature a street fest outside the stadium and the always popular alumni flag football game at halftime.
item.dc:creator: WFLA, NBC

item.title: In the era of big velocities, some pitchers are still finding other ways to succeed
item.description: SURPRISE, Ariz. (AP) — Texas Rangers left-hander Cody Bradford says he realized early on that he probably wouldn’t ever possess the type of fastball that causes scouts to take a second look at their radar guns.
item.dc:creator: STEVE MEGARGEE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Bucks say Damian Lillard has deep vein thrombosis in his right calf
item.description: MILWAUKEE (AP) — Milwaukee Bucks guard Damian Lillard likely will be sidelined indefinitely, with the team announcing Tuesday night that he has deep vein thrombosis in his right calf and is taking blood-thinning medication.
item.dc:creator: STEVE MEGARGEE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Blues post 7 consecutive wins in a push to make the playoffs after a two-year absence
item.description: ST. LOUIS (AP) — The wins just keep on coming for the St. Louis Blues, and their seven-game streak has significantly improved their chances of returning to the playoffs after a two-year absence.
item.dc:creator: WARREN MAYES, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Argentina secures a World Cup spot and then celebrates it with a 4-1 victory over archrival Brazil
item.description: BUENOS AIRES, Argentina (AP) — Defending champion Argentina celebrated throughout Tuesday as the team secured its place at the 2026 World Cup hours before an historic 4-1 win over archrival Brazil.
item.dc:creator: DEBORA REY and MAURICIO SAVARESE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Los Angeles Dodgers to make Trump White House visit next month
item.description: The Los Angeles Dodgers plan to visit President Donald Trump at the White House to celebrate their World Series victory, the team announced Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Travis Schlepp, Fox 5

item.title: Jerrod Calhoun signs new contract with USU
item.description: LOGAN, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - For the first time in three years, Utah State will not have to search for a new head basketball coach.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Bulls stay hot, down Nuggets to win 3rd straight and 8th of last 10
item.description: DENVER (AP) — Suddenly, the Chicago Bulls are one of the hottest teams in the NBA, and they kept things rolling late Monday night in Denver.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Colorado State's Niko Medved leaves for Minnesota after 7-year run with Rams
item.description: Niko Medved, the second-winningest coach in Rams' history, has accepted the head coaching job with the Big Ten's Minnesota.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Alabama rolls by Saint Mary's 80-66 to reach the NCAA Tournament's Sweet 16 for a 3rd straight year
item.description: CLEVELAND (AP) — Alabama turned the page on the program's first Final Four appearance the moment the players received their commemorative rings in October. Coach Nate Oats knew his team needed to get a little deeper and more athletic, and find more balance to go even further this season.
item.dc:creator: WILL GRAVES, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Brackets busted: No perfect March Madness brackets remain after Sunday's games
item.description: Brackets, busted. The handful of remaining perfect brackets in the NCAA Tournament busted out on Sunday, ending the hopes of millions against exceptionally long odds. The final perfect brackets on Yahoo Sports and CBS Sports were shredded with Saturday's games.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Hall, Kitts rally top-seeded South Carolina to Sweet 16 in 64-53 March Madness win over Indiana
item.description: COLUMBIA, S.C. (AP) — Bree Hall had 11 points and Chloe Kitts scored all her 10 points in the second half as top seed South Carolina pulled away after trailing at halftime to beat ninth-seeded Indiana 64-53 on Sunday in the women’s NCAA Tournament and reach the Sweet 16 for the 11th straight time.
item.dc:creator: PETE IACOBELLI, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: New York girls basketball coach fired for hair-pulling incident with player apologizes
item.description: In a statement shared with local media, Zullo, 81, said he regretted his behavior and offered apologies to the player, her family, the team, the district, and the community.
item.dc:creator: Griffin Haas, NewsNation

item.title: BYU headed to Sweet 16 after 91-89 win over Wisconsin
item.description: DENVER (ABC4 Sports) - For the first time in 14 years, the BYU basketball team is headed to the Sweet 16. Richie Saunders scored 25 points, while Trevin Knell added 14, as the Cougars held off a ferocious late run by Wisconsin to hold on for a 91-89 victory at Ball Arena in Denver.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: LeBron James' return from injury spoiled by Bulls' phenomenal effort in 146-115 win over Lakers
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — LeBron James' return from a seven-game absence was the dominant storyline, to say the least, when the Bulls got ready to face the Lakers in Los Angeles on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: No. 1 seed Houston holds off Gonzaga comeback, beats No. 8 seed Bulldogs 81-76 to reach Sweet 16
item.description: LJ Cryer matched a career high with 30 points, including two free throws with 14.2 seconds left, and No. 1 seed Houston held on to beat eighth-seeded Gonzaga 81-76 on Saturday night to reach the Sweet 16 for the sixth straight NCAA Tournament.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Red Rocks win Big 12 Championship
item.description: WEST VALLEY CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The University of Utah claimed the Big 12 regular season and Championship titles during its debut season in the Conference after the Red Rocks tallied a score of 197.775 at the 2025 Big 12 Gymnastics Championship held at the Maverik Center in West Valley City, Utah.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Utah HC wins scoring fest over Tampa Bay, 6-4
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (AP) - Logan Cooley and Alex Kerfoot each scored twice and the Utah Hockey Club defeated the Tampa Bay Lightning 6-4 at Delta Center on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Purdue ends McNeese's March Madness run 76-62 to get back to Sweet 16
item.description: Trey Kaufman-Renn had 22 points and 15 rebounds, and Purdue used a fast start to roll to a 76-62 win over McNeese in the second round of the NCAA Tournament on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: KYLE HIGHTOWER, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: San Diego FC are headed to the Lone Star State to take on Austin FC
item.description: San Diego FC are gearing up for Matchday 5 of the MLS season, which will see them head to the Texas capital to take on Austin FC at 1:00 p.m. on Sunday March 23rd.
item.dc:creator: Chase Izidoro, Fox 5

item.title: Lakers play the Bulls on 3-game win streak
item.description: Chicago Bulls (30-40, ninth in the Eastern Conference) vs. Los Angeles Lakers (43-25, fourth in the Western Conference) Los Angeles; Saturday, 10:30 p.m. EDT BOTTOM LINE: Los Angeles heads into a matchup with Chicago as winners of three games in a row. The Lakers are 28-7 in home games.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9
